passions_detected.false_judgement: That wealth and status achievements are genuinely good rather than preferred indifferents — acknowledged as a tension
That aging and loss of youth represent genuine evils rather than natural fate

causal_observations.description: Stomach pain reframed as opportunity — good application of withholding assent from 'this is bad' impression and replacing with 'this is an opportunity for discipline'.
Tension identified: wealth 'indifference' difficult because wife and self celebrate wealth/status achievements. The household relationship complicates individual assent.

value_observations.observed_as: honestly acknowledges this is his and his wife's shared value system — not yet classified as indifferent in practice

value_observations.declared_as: not yet achieved — at acceptance stage working toward love
value_observations.observed_as: honest self-assessment. Progression visible: past acceptance achieved, future acceptance in progress.

virtue_observations.evidence: Choosing to accept challenges out of comfort zone. Practising resilience and restraint.
Choosing to live more frugally. Recognises wealth indifference as biggest challenge.
Fate as a guide not a dictator — 'recalibrating to accommodate virtues at every moment ensures the path is the correct path'

key_passages.summary: Biggest challenge to wealth indifference: wife and self have made the journey about wealth and status, and often celebrate them
Gratitude inventory including kangaroo with joey — 'grateful that further journeying is possible'
